requirements: R2: directly_follows(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'check credit worthiness')
R3: leads_to(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'determine loan risk level')
R4: executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'supervisor')
R6: executed_by_return(tree, 'check customer bank privilege') != executed_by_return(tree, 'check credit worthiness')
R7: executed_by(tree, 'check acceptable risks', 'branch office manager')
R10: exists(tree, 'approve request') and exists(tree, 'reject request')
R12: condition_eventually_follows(tree, "loanRequestCredit > 1000000", executed_by(tree, "check credit worthiness", "clerk supervisor"))
R13: condition_directly_follows(tree, "(loanRequestCredit > 1000000) and (not executed_by(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'clerk supervisor'))", "create suspense file")
R15: not condition_eventually_follows(tree, "customerStatus == \"gold\"", "check customer bank privilege")
